message:
feat(e2e): expand E2E infrastructure with canonicalization, FrankenSQLite executor, TUI dashboard, and three-tier recovery verification

Major infrastructure additions to the fsqlite-e2e crate:

canonicalize.rs (bd-1w6k.5.2): database canonicalization pipeline that
produces deterministic SHA-256 hashes for logical database content. The
pipeline checkpoints the WAL, normalizes PRAGMAs (page_size=4096,
auto_vacuum=NONE), then runs VACUUM INTO to produce a defragmented
single-file copy. This eliminates non-deterministic byte-level
differences (freelist layout, WAL state, page allocation order) that
would cause false-negative SHA-256 comparisons between engines.

fsqlite_executor.rs (bd-1w6k.3.3): OpLog executor for the FrankenSQLite
engine. Runs OpLog records against fsqlite::Connection, handling the
!Send constraint by executing all workers sequentially on a single
thread. Collects per-operation timing, error tracking, and produces
EngineRunReport compatible with the existing C SQLite executor output.
Includes correctness checking against ExpectedResult annotations.

executor.rs enhancements: adds sqlite3 version detection (--version),
stdout capture with 4KiB truncation for reports, and a safe
duration_to_u64_ms helper replacing raw as-casts that could silently
truncate on extremely long runs.

golden.rs (bd-391r): implements three-tier recovery verification for
comparing golden copies against repaired databases:
  - Tier 1 (SHA-256): cryptographic bit-for-bit match proof
  - Tier 2 (Logical): schema + sorted row comparison via deterministic
    logical dumps, tolerating physical layout differences
  - Tier 3 (Completeness): row count and spot-check verification as a
    fallback when full logical comparison is impractical
Also adds table-level content hashing and spot-check sampling helpers.

report.rs: introduces RunRecordV1 (JSONL-formatted per-run records),
EngineRunReport (per-engine execution metrics with timing histograms),
CorrectnessReport (multi-tier equality fields: raw_sha256_match,
dump_match, canonical_sha256_match, integrity_check_ok), and an
equality policy explanation constant documenting the three tiers of
equivalence (raw SHA-256, canonical SHA-256, logical comparison).

e2e_dashboard.rs (bd-3ppz): replaces the placeholder stub with a full
FrankenTUI-based terminal dashboard. Implements an mpsc event channel
for feeding background progress (benchmark progress, corruption
injection, recovery attempts, correctness checks) into a live-updating
TUI. Supports --headless mode for CI environments, rendering events as
structured text instead of terminal widgets.

realdb_e2e.rs: substantially expanded from basic golden-copy testing to
a full RealDB E2E runner. Adds dual-engine execution (C SQLite via
sqlite3 CLI + FrankenSQLite via fsqlite_executor), three-tier
equivalence comparison, JSONL run-record logging, and human-readable
summary output with per-fixture pass/fail status.

lib.rs: exports the new canonicalize and fsqlite_executor modules.

sqlite_executor.rs: minor adjustments for API compatibility with the
expanded report structures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -185,9 +185,13 @@ pub fn run_oplog_sqlite(
         retries,
         aborts,
         correctness: CorrectnessReport {
+            raw_sha256_match: None,
             dump_match: None,
             canonical_sha256_match: None,
             integrity_check_ok: None,
+            raw_sha256: None,
+            canonical_sha256: None,
+            logical_sha256: None,
             notes: None,
         },
         latency_ms: None,
